description: composite operator — drive a playbook of sub-skills through govd, tracking + steering against the plan (the top-layer project manager)
rules: a composite skill fires OTHER skills (the playbook's caller skills) via run_governed; it runs no tools of its own
idempotent: a task already redeemed (done-ledger v1+v2) is skipped
per step: fire the sub-skill validator; on a clean governed pass, optionally redeem via cws-observe/redeem
steers: STOP_ON_FAIL halts the sequence; otherwise it collects and reports blocked/failed for the operator to adjust
DRY_RUN validates the playbook (every skill/perk exists) without firing
usage: Set PLAYBOOK (a JSON list of {task_id, skill, perk, vars, redeem}). Optional GOVD_URL, SWARM_DIR + DONE_LEDGER (for skip-if-redeemed + redemption), DRY_RUN, STOP_ON_FAIL. Output: pm.json (per-step + roll-up).
limitation: It DRIVES redeemable steps (validators whose subject already exists + inputs are declared); it cannot author the subject — tasks needing construction are reported for the agent/operator to build, then re-run. Fires sub-skills against a running govd.
